---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for TripRep
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear description of what the
problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope

Which part of TripRep would this affect? (e.g. tickets, reservations, trips,
statistics, AI extraction, profile)

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
